---
format: 
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
execute: 
  keep-md: true
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(dplyr)
library(huxtable)
library(knitr)
library(typMisc)

options(huxtable.print = print_typst)

```

## Table

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: 'asis'


BOD %>%
  as_hux() %>%  
  set_all_borders(1) %>%
  table_note("This is a \\ note")

breakable(TRUE)
iris %>%
  as_hux() %>%
  set_all_borders(1)

```

Some more text.
